No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to poverty eradication or its specific targets.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course provides hands-on opportunities to develop professional skills and creative practice, directly preparing students for productive employment and decent work (Target 8.5) and reducing youth not in employment (Target 8.6).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course utilizes specific labs (e.g., Digital Platform, Audio-Visual Lab) and emphasizes 'innovation ability' and 'media capability,' directly contributing to upgrading technological capabilities in the media industry (Target 9.5).

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to climate change mitigation, adaptation, or resilience.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or deforestation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course emphasizes 'ethics capability' and 'Respect Copyright' (Target 16.3). The 'News and Media Lab' directly supports public access to information and fundamental freedoms (Target 16.10).
